summary: Student Course Management Platform where students browse courses, pay via UPI (9424135055@ptyes), submit transaction ID, wait for admin approval, then log in via Internet Identity. Admin logs in with hardcoded email (mrjain950761@gmail.com) to approve/reject payments, manage per-student Google Meet sessions, materials, and attendance tracking.
architectural_notes: Authentication: Students use Internet Identity (blockchain-based, no passwords). Admin uses hardcoded email login (mrjain950761@gmail.com only, no public registration).
UPI payment flow is fully manual: student pays externally, submits transaction ID as proof, admin manually verifies and approves.
All sessions and materials are assigned per individual student by admin — no shared/public content.
known_issues: Build has failed twice when attempting to implement Internet Identity + full system together; user now requests scoped change only (remove custom login, add Internet Identity for students).

existing_features.title: Remove the custom student login form (email + unique code fields) from the Login page. Replace it with an Internet Identity login button for students. When a student clicks the button, trigger the Internet Identity authentication flow using the existing useInternetIdentity hook. After successful authentication, check if the student's principal is approved in the backend; if approved, redirect to the student dashboard. If not yet approved, show a message that their account is pending admin approval.

Update the student-facing layouts and route guards to use the Internet Identity principal (from useInternetIdentity hook) instead of any localStorage-based custom auth token or unique code for determining if a student is logged in. The StudentLayout sidebar logout button should call the Internet Identity logout function. Do not change the AdminLayout or any admin route guards.

new_feature_requests.summary: Student Course Management Platform with Internet Identity auth for students and hardcoded email auth for admin
Pre-login flow: browse courses with hourly pricing, select course, enter hours, see total, pay via UPI, submit transaction ID
Admin panel: approve/reject payments, generate access, add Google Meet sessions per student, add materials per student, track attendance, view student list with counts
Student dashboard (post-approval): My Course, My Classes (Google Meet), My Materials, Attendance status, Payment status
Remove all custom login logic; students authenticate exclusively via Internet Identity; admin authenticates via hardcoded email mrjain950761@gmail.com

Remove all remaining custom credential authentication logic for students from the backend (main.mo). Any functions that validate email + unique code combinations for student login should be removed or disabled. Student identity verification must rely solely on the caller's Internet Identity principal. Do not change any admin-related logic, payment approval logic, session management, materials management, or attendance tracking.
